qrcode.desc: Ka taea e koe te tā me te whakapiri i tēnei waehere QR ki te tūemi. Mā te karapa ka tahurikē hāngai tonu ki tēnei whārangi.

items.subtitle: Tomo ngā taipitopito taonga
items.load_error: Kua rahua te uta i te taonga

form.name: Ingoa Taonga
form.location_help: Kei hea i te rūma? (hei tauira, 'Tāperekau runga o te kāpene kikorangi')
form.location_public: Ka taea e te katoa te kite i tēnei wāhi
form.location_private: Ko koe anake ka taea te kite i tēnei
form.location_empty: Kāore he wāhi i tautuhia i roto i tēnei rūma ināianei. Tīmatahia te patopato kia waihanga wāhi.
form.visibility_public: Ari ana ki ngā mema katoa o te whare

messages.quick_add_success: ✓ Kua tāpirihia tere te "{{barcode}}" - ka taea e koe te whakatika ā muri ake
messages.not_found: ⚠ Kāore he hua i kitea i ngā pātengi raraunga. Ka taea e koe te rapu i runga i Google.

common.copyright: © {{year}} HomeInventory - Kua rēhitatia ētehi tika katoa

login.title: Tāuru
login.subtitle: Whakahaerehia katoa ō taonga o te kāinga me te mātau
login.terms_title: 📋 Ngā Āhua Whakamahi me te Whakakāhoretanga
login.terms_beta: Putanga BETA: Kei te whakamātautau ināianei a HomeInventory. Kāore he taurite ka tukuna mō te toitūtanga, te haumaru rānei o ō raraunga.
login.terms_disclaimer: Whakakāhoretanga: Mā te whakamahi i tēnei taupānga, ka whakaae koe kāore e taea e koe te tono hōpunga mō te ngaronga o ngā raraunga pea, ngā raruraru takiuru, ngā hapa hangarau rānei.
login.terms_backup: Tārua Raraunga: Ka tūtohu kaha mātou ki te tārua i ō kōrero hira i ia wā.
login.terms_accept: Mā te takiuru, ka whakaarohia kua whakaaetia e koe ēnei tikanga.

register.title: Nau mai ki HomeInventory
register.subtitle: Waihangahia he pūkete hou, whakawhāngai rānei ki te whare e noho ana
register.create_house_desc: 🏠 Ka waihangahia he whare hou ā ka whiwhi koe i tētahi Kī Whare ahurei. Tukuna tēnei kī ki te whānau kia taea te uru ki taua rārangi taonga kotahi.
register.join_house_desc: 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 Takiuru i te Kī Whare i tukuna ki a koe kia hono ki tētahi whare kua oti kē. Ko te tangata katoa e whai ana i te kī ka taea te uru ki ngā taonga e tiritiria ana.
register.terms: Ngā Tikanga Whakamahi me te Whakakore Haepapa
register.passwords_mismatch: Kāore ngā kupuhipa e ōrite ana
register.password_length: Me kākau te kupuhipa he iti rawa iho i te 6 ngā pūāhua
register.key_required: Me whai Kī Whare hei hono atu ki tētahi whare e mau ana

key_created.title: 🎉 Kua Waihangatia te Whare!
key_created.subtitle: Tiakina te kī i raro i tētahi wāhi haumaru
key_created.warning: He mea Hiranga: Ka whakaatuhia tēnei kī kotahi anake. Tohaina ki ngā mema whānau kia taea e rātou te uru ki te taonga kotahi.
key_created.button: Kua Tiakina e Au te Kī, Haere Tonu

email_verification.title: 📧 Me Whakatautuhia te īmēra
email_verification.message: Kua waihangatia te pūkete! Tēnā whakapūmautia tō wāhitau īmēra hei whakakāinga.
email_verification.step_1: Kua tukuna e mātou he īmēra whakatautuhia ki <1>{{email}}</1>.
email_verification.step_2: Pāwhiritia te pātene <1>"Whakatautuhia Tāku Pūkete"</1> ki roto i te īmēra.
email_verification.step_3: Whai muri i te tirotiro, <1>ka taea e koe te takiuru</1>.
email_verification.spam_note: Tirohia te kōpaki hapa / otaota mēnā kāore te īmēra i tae mai.
email_verification.key_note: Tāwhai: I tukuna hoki te kī o tō whare i roto i te īmēra. Ka taea e koe te tiri ki ngā mema o te whānau.

forgot_password.title: I wareware te Kupuhipa
forgot_password.subtitle: Tīmatahia he rerenga whakaora haumaru kia taea ai te uru atu anō ki tō pūkete.
forgot_password.email_success: Mēnā he pūkete tā, kua tukuna tētahi hono tautuhi kupuhipa e manako mō te 15 meneti.
forgot_password.recovery_mode_info: Kua whakakorehia te īmēra i runga i tēnei tūmau. Haere tonu me te Kī Whakaora i tiakina e koe i te wā i whakatūngia ai te pūkete.

reset_password.title: Whakahou Kupuhipa
reset_password.subtitle: Whakamahia te hono haumaru hei whakatū i te kupuhipa hou.
reset_password.missing_token: Kei te ahua kāore i oti, kāore rānei, te hono whakahou kupuhipa.

recovery_setup.title: Waihanga Kī Whakaora
recovery_setup.subtitle: Kia oti tēnei, kāore e kīia tō pūkete he haumaru mō te whakaora kupuhipa ā-rohe.
recovery_setup.warning: Ka whakaaturia tēnei kī kotahi noa iho. Tiakina i roto i tētahi kaiwhakahaere kupuhipa, i tētahi atu wāhi haumaru ā-ipurangi rānei.
recovery_setup.account: Ka waihangahia tētahi kī whakaora mō te pūkete {{username}}.
recovery_setup.description: Nā te mea kua whakakorehia te īmēra, ka taea noa e koe te tautuhi anō i tō kupuhipa me tēnei kī ā muri ake nei.

recovery_key_modal.subtitle: Ka whakaatuhia tēnei kī kotahi anake.
recovery_key_modal.warning: Mēnā ka ngaro tēnei kī i a koe i te wā e whakakorehia ana te īmēra, kāore pea e taea e koe te whakaora i tō kupuhipa. Tārua, penapena hoki i runga i te haumaru.
recovery_key_modal.confirm: Kua Tiakina e au te Kī

auth.password_requirements: Whakamahia tetahi iti rawa o ngā pūāhua {{min}} me te pūtahi nui, pūtahi iti, tau, me te tohu.

dashboard.subtitle: Tirohanga whānui o tō rārangi taonga

filters.no_items: Kāore he taonga e hāngai ana ki tēnei tātaritanga

categories.title: Kāwai
categories.empty: Kāore he tūemi kua tāpirihia ināianei

beta_banner.title: BETA:
beta_banner.text: Kei te whakamātautau me te hākinakina a HomeInventory i tēnei wā. Kāore he whakamana mō te mau tonu o ngā raraunga, o te haumaru rānei. Tēnā kia mau tonu ngā tārua pūrua o ngā kōrero nui.

messages.unexpected_error: I puta tētahi hapa kāore i tūmanakohia

my_houses.title: Āku Whare
my_houses.no_house: Kāore koe i te mema o tētahi whare tae noa ki tēnei wā
my_houses.info: 💡 Ka taea e koe te noho hei mema o ngā whare maha me te whakawhiti i waenga i a rātou. Ka pupuri ia whare i tētahi rarangi motuhake.

house_info.title: Pātuhi Whare Hohe
house_info.share_info: 💡 Ka taea e ngā kaiwhakamahi e tiritiri ana koe i tēnei kī te uru ki tō rarangi mā te whakamahi i te kōwhiringa "Hono Whare" i te wā o te rēhitatanga.
house_info.invite_title: Pōhiritia ngā mema o te whānau
house_info.invite_desc: Tiria tō kī whare kia uru ai ngā mema o te whānau ki te rarangi ōrite. Ka takiuru ia mema me tōna ake pūkete, engari ka uru ki te raraunga ōrite.
house_info.no_pending_requests: Kāore he tono e tūmanako ana
house_info.owner_controls: Kua whakahohehia ngā mana a te Kaiwhakaari

security.title: Haumarutanga
security.change_password_desc: Whakahou i te kupuhipa o tō pūkete
security.recovery_key_desc: Ka taea e koe te hanga kī hou mō te whakaora kupuhipa ā-rohe.
security.recovery_key_missing: Kāore he kī whakaora e kitea mō tēnei pūkete i tēnei wā.
security.recovery_key_unavailable: Kāore e taea te whakaatu i te kī whakaora o nāianei. Hangaia anō mēnā e hiahiatia ana.
security.recovery_key_modal_desc: Whakau i tō kupuhipa o nāianei kia haere tonu. Ka whakaatuhia te kī hou kotahi anake.

join_house.title: Whakauru ki te Whare
join_house.key_help: Tāuru mai te kī i riro mai i tō whānau

create_house.title: Hanga Whare Hou
create_house.name_placeholder: 例如, Whare Raumati, Tari, Putunga
create_house.name_help: Mēnā ka waiho tāpiri, ka kīia ko "Taku Whare Hou"
create_house.info: ℹ️ Ka hanga awheawhe me ngā rūma taunoa mō te whare hou. Ka taea e koe te whakatika ā muri ake nei.

logs.no_errors: // Kei te ora te pūnaha, kāore he rārangi hē.

email.title: Tuku I-mēra
email.subject: Kaupapa
email.success: Kua tukuna te īmēra me te angitu!

hero.description: Tāpiritia te rārangi rawa o tō kāinga ki te rorohiko. Whakarōpūhia ngā tūemi, tonoa ētahi kāinga, ka taea te toro mai i hea. Pōturi, haumaru, ā, māmā ki te whakamahi.

features.title: He Aha <1>HomeInventory</1>?
features.subtitle: Ngā āhuatanga katoa hei whakangawari i te whakahaere kāinga i roto i te papa kotahi

categorize.title: Whakarōpūhia Ngā Tūemi
categorize.desc: Whakaritea ngā tūemi katoa mō ia rūma, mō ia rōpū, kitea ngā mea e hiahiatia ana i roto i ngā hēkona.

family.title: Tonoa Ngā Kāinga me te Kī Kāinga
family.desc: Tonoa ngā mema whānau mā tō kī whare motuhake, whakahaerea te rārangi taonga tahi.

access.title: Wātea Mai i Ahiahi Katoa
access.desc: I te kāinga, i te mahi, i te hararei - toro haumaru ki tō rārangi taonga mai i hea atu.

barcode.title: Tāpiri Tere mā te Waehere Paerewa
barcode.desc: Tāutuhia ngā waehere paerewa o ngā hua, ka whakakī aunoa ngā taipitopito.

security.title: Haumaru me te Noa
security.desc: Kua whakamunatia āu raraunga, ā, e tiakina ana mā te hanganga KVKK e ū ana.

backup.title: Pūrua & Kaweake
backup.desc: Pūruahia tō rārangi taonga i te hōputu JSON, whakahokia ia wā e hiahia ana koe.

cta_bottom.title: Tīmatahia Te Whakamahi Ināianei!
cta_bottom.description: Waihangatia he pūkete kore utu, ka matapōkere tō rārangi taonga whare. Ka pau noa hēkona torutoru te rehita.

footer.desc: Te papa māmā, haumaru hoki hei matapōkerei i tō rārangi taonga whare.
footer.copyright: © {{year}} HomeInventory. Kua rahuitia ngā tika katoa.

landing.preview_privacy_notice: Tirohanga whakaaturanga: kāore he raraunga kaiwhakamahi tūturu e whakaatuhia.

inventory.title: Rārangi taonga
inventory.content: Anei ka taea e koe te tāpiri me te rārangi i ō taonga. Aroturukihia ngā taonga katoa o te kāinga i tētahi wāhi kotahi!

house_key.title: Kī Kāinga
house_key.content: Koinei tō kī kāinga, whakamahia hei pōwhiri i ētahi atu. Tāpirihia ngā mema whānau ki tō kāinga!

categories.title: Ngā Kāwai
categories.content: Whakahaerehia mā te wehenga wāhanga o ō taonga. Hiko, tūturu, kīhini, me ētahi atu!

google_house_select.title: Nau mai!
google_house_select.subtitle: I takiuru koe mā Google. Ināianei, tīpakohia he whare.
google_house_select.welcome_options: He aha tāu e hiahia ana ki te mahi?
